window.note: The repository does not have a public published release in this environment. This policy therefore applies to the prepared promotion bundle and RC train artifacts rather than to live published npm artifacts.

acceptedChanges.nextMinorException: Only when a deliberate next-minor train is explicitly opened and documented.
disallowedWithoutNewTrain: feature expansion on the released train

releaseClaimPolicy.reason: The minimum closure checklist is not fully green because there is still no actual published release and earlier strict-closure blockers remain recorded in the evidence.
